name: Seasame Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chicken in a large pot with enough water to cover it, then add an inverted dish or wide can without ends and a plate supported above the water. Bring to a boil.
2. Steam for 45 minutes to an hour, depending on size and desired doneness. Turn off heat, remove lid, and let steam disperse. Remove chicken when cool enough to handle.
3. Heat sesame oil in a pan until hot. Brown ginger briefly.
4. Add soy sauce, teriyaki sauce, and sugar; stir until sugar dissolves.
5. Pour sauce over chicken and serve warm or at room temperature.
